t_ch: {F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}，你知道的，我可是等着你开终场香槟啊。
t_en: Hey {F#missy}{M#bro}, you know I'm saving that victory ambrosia just for you.

t_ch: 要是你赢下了所有比赛，你可得和我来几场指导赛啊！
t_en: If you do win this whole thing, you owe me a few coaching sessions!

t_ch: 公民们，「豹豹碰碰大作战」迎来了最终的冠军赛，赛程尚未开始，热情的浴场观众们已经翘首以盼，期待着激动人心的对决现场。
t_en: Citizens, the Seal Slammers Championship is about to begin! The arena is already buzzing with excitement as the crowd eagerly awaits the thrilling matches ahead!

t_ch: 当然，还有最令人期待的四位冠军角逐者，他们都已经到场了！
t_en: Not to mention, our four championship contenders are all ready and waiting!

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}别看我，我没什么可说的。
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}, stop looking at me like that. I got nothing to say.

t_ch: 你小子什么时候参加的？
t_en: Since when did you decide to compete?

t_ch: …说来话长。
t_en: It's... complicated.

t_ch: 你怎么悄没声息就来了？
t_en: How did you make it this far without anyone noticing?

t_ch: 哎…我尽可能不在前面的赛程里露面。
t_en: Well... I did my best to keep a low profile during the earlier rounds.

t_ch: 丹恒选手虽是一位突然加入比赛的幽灵选手，但成绩都是货真价实的。
t_en: Dan Heng may be an elusive contestant, and his entrance sudden, but his results are entirely legitimate.

t_ch: 总之，事情复杂，等我们正面对上时，我再向你解释。
t_en: Look, it's complicated. I'll explain everything when we face each other.

t_ch: …在比赛开始之前，请允许我们向大家谢罪——
t_en: Before we begin, we owe everyone an apology—

t_ch: 正如大家所见，咱们比赛的「金海豹杯」丢了。
t_en: As you can all see, our Gold Seal Cup is gone.

t_ch: 阿波菲斯当众讲述了奖杯被窃的始末……
t_en: Apophis relates the tale of how the trophy was stolen to the audience...

t_ch: 就这么件小事吗？我认为无论有没有奖杯，比赛都应该继续下去！
t_en: That's it? Who needs a trophy? Let's get the show back on the road!

t_ch: …对啊，我们就是喜欢「豹豹碰碰大作战」！
t_en: Exactly, we're here to watch some "Seal Slammers"!

t_ch: 老实说，不冲着奖杯，就为图一乐，我都盼着去参加下次比赛了！
t_en: Yeah! I'm here to have fun, not for a trophy! I can't wait to get in there and compete myself!

t_ch: 快接着比赛吧，别管那些{RUBY_B#窃贼}扎格列斯信徒{RUBY_E#}了！
t_en: Then let's get on with the matches! We won't let those {RUBY_B#Thieves}followers of Zagreus{RUBY_E#} ruin this!

t_ch: 奖杯丢失的失落也压不住众人对比赛的热情，阿波菲斯心中的忐忑也被冲淡了。
t_en: Even with the trophy gone, the audience's excitement hasn't abated in the least, easing Apophis's concerns.

t_ch: 公民们，朋友们…既然如此——
t_en: Friends, citizens, countrymen... if that's how you feel—

t_ch: ——「豹豹碰碰大作战」继续！
t_en: Let the Seal Slamming continue!

t_ch: 根据赛程分组结果，{NICKNAME}选手将对战丹恒选…手…您这是？
t_en: Now, based on the results of the draw, {NICKNAME} will face Dan He...ng? Wait, what exactly is going on here?

t_ch: 怎么了吗？
t_en: Is there a problem?

t_ch: 你这是什么派对浪客造型？
t_en: What's with the party animal look?

t_ch: …豹子头•丹恒。
t_en: Call me... Dan Heng, Seal Master.

t_ch: 你为什么…要戴上墨镜？
t_en: And what's with the... sunglasses?

t_ch: 因为…墨镜一戴，谁也不爱？或者简单来说…眼不见，心不烦。
t_en: Well... shades of glory, end of story? Or simply... out of sight, out of mind.

t_ch: 哈哈，想不到吧？我也有！
t_en: Haha, surprise! I've got a pair too!

t_ch: 不愧是丹恒，他果然很懂「星穹列车德比」应有的气氛，你也应该戴上它。
t_en: That's Dan Heng for you, knowing exactly what the Astral Express derby needs. You should wear them too.

t_ch: 到了决赛阶段，我有一问，{NICKNAME}选手，你是为了什么而战？
t_en: Now that we're in the finals, {NICKNAME}, tell us, what are you fighting for?

t_ch: 为了奖杯和活动奖励。
t_en: For the trophy and those sweet, sweet event rewards.

t_ch: 啊这…这说明{NICKNAME}选手不忘初心！
t_en: Oh... {NICKNAME} is certainly sticking to their original goal!

t_ch: 为了击败泡泡。
t_en: To beat Bubbles.

t_ch: 看来，你很在意那只小奇美拉。
t_en: That little Chimera really caught your attention, huh?

t_ch: 我只是凑个热闹。
t_en: I'm just here for the fun of it.

t_ch: 咱这比赛上的热闹已经够多了！
t_en: Well, we've got plenty of that to go around here!

t_ch: 丹恒选手，请问你又是为了什么而战呢？
t_en: And you, Dan Heng, what are YOU fighting for?

t_ch: 「求胜的怨念」。
t_en: "An obsession to win."

t_ch: 你们还记得小组赛时的那个患者——普赫斯，以及他那只绷带海豹吗？
t_en: Do you remember Perhippas and his Bandaged Seal from the Group Stage?

t_ch: 回到昏光庭院后，我本以为我的好心就到这里了…但是普赫斯抓住我的手，非要将那只绷带海豹托付给我，如果我不参赛，他就拒绝治疗——
t_en: Back at the Twilight Courtyard, I thought I was finished helping him... but he clutched my hand and demanded I take his Bandaged Seal. He wouldn't accept treatment unless I competed—

t_ch: 「丹恒阁下你的才华是我的十倍，必能取胜。如果绷带海豹可以辅佐，请你辅佐它；如果绷带海豹不可以辅佐，你就自己重组个队伍……」
t_en: "Lord Dan Heng, your skills far exceed mine. You're sure to win. Take my Bandaged Seal if it will be of use to you, or if it isn't, make your own team..."

t_ch: 为了让他接受治疗，我被迫带上绷带海豹参加比赛，没想到一路赢到了现在。
t_en: To ensure he accepted his treatment, I had to enter with Bandaged Seal. I never expected we'd make it this far.

t_ch: 哎，争斗…并无意义。
t_en: *sigh* All this fighting... it's meaningless.

t_ch: 原来是普赫斯选手的「求胜的怨念」。
t_en: So it's Perhippas's "obsession to win."

t_ch: 不止，你看它。
t_en: That's not all. Look at this.
o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "All I wanna do is win, win, win~~")∋

t_ch: 绷带海豹伤势太重，昏光庭院已经尽了全力。然后，它也带着「求胜的怨念」，变成了一只幽灵海豹回来了……
t_en: Despite the Twilight Courtyard's best efforts, the Bandaged Seal's wounds were fatal. Now it's back as a Ghost Seal, carrying its "obsession to win"...

t_ch: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「豹毙了~~但豹又转生成为小海豹了~~」)∋
t_en: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "My fate was sealed~~ But now, I'm back~ A seal once more~~")∋

t_ch: 我会让你的胜利flag全部破灭。
t_en: Time to break your winning streak.

t_ch: 驱邪…缚魅…灵符…保命……
t_en: Demons... depart... Give me... strength...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，假如你有足够的实力，就快来击碎这份怨念吧。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, if you have what it takes, come put an end to this obsession.

t_ch: 感谢比赛双方炒热了狂欢的气氛！
t_en: Look at that! Both contestants have really gotten the crowd all fired up!

t_ch: 恭喜{NICKNAME}选手获胜！终结了幽灵海豹的不败传说！看来，幽灵海豹的怨念可以消散了？
t_en: Congratulations, {NICKNAME}! You've ended the Ghost Seal's winning streak! Is this enough to put an end to its obsession?

t_ch: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「丹恒，该是偿还代价的时候了！时候到了~~」)∋
t_en: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "Dan Heng, It's time to pay the price! It's time!!!~~")∋

t_ch: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「你…你甚至连『死』都没有经受过~~」)∋
t_en: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "You... You didn't even experience death~~")∋

t_ch: 怎么，你也有魔阴身啊？
t_en: What, you're stricken with mara too?

t_ch: 我经历过，我有发言权…
t_en: I've experienced death. I have the right to speak about this...

t_ch: 庭院的人说它精神状态不太好，但没想到是这么不好。
t_en: The Courtyard warned me about its mental state, but this is worse than I imagined.

t_ch: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「我要让你知道『死』的痛苦~~」)∋
t_en: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "You will know the pain of death~~")∋

t_ch: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「豹、豹会一直注视着你们，永远永远~~无处可逃~~」)∋
t_en: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "I... I will watch you forever and ever~~ You can't escape~~")∋

t_ch: …总觉得今晚要做噩梦。
t_en: ...I can already tell I'll have nightmares tonight.

t_ch: 哎哟！幽灵海豹的怨念好像更盛了。
t_en: Goodness! The Ghost Seal's obsession has grown even stronger!

t_ch: 别在意我了，下一场就是你和泡泡的决赛了，你要继续吗？
t_en: You needn't concern yourself over me. You've got the final against Bubbles coming up. Are you ready to continue?

t_ch: 没问题，乘胜追击！
t_en: Absolutely, strike while the iron's hot!

t_ch: 我先休息一下。
t_en: I need a break first.

t_ch: 尽管本场决赛的冠军不会拿到「金海豹杯」，但我从现场观众的热情能看出，胜利本身就是最好的奖品！
t_en: Though there's no Gold Seal Cup waiting for the winner of this particular match, the crowd's excitement proves victory alone is the ultimate reward!

t_ch: *热烈的欢呼声*
t_en: *Thunderous cheering*

t_ch: 风堇选手，面对泡泡从前的搭档{NICKNAME}选手，你有什么话要说吗？
t_en: Hyacine, do you have any words for Bubbles' former partner {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 我聆听到了一点泡泡的心事，想替傲娇的小家伙说两句……
t_en: I've sensed some of Bubbles' feelings, and I'd like to speak for our proud friend...

t_ch: 泡泡选择离开灰宝，是因为争强好胜的小家伙想要证明：泡泡也能「独当一面」。
t_en: Bubbles left Grayie because our competitive friend wanted to prove he was capable of "making it alone."

t_ch: 但我发现，胜利并没有让泡泡开心。直到灰宝站在对面，泡泡的眼中才真正燃起了光。
t_en: But I've seen that winning alone doesn't bring Bubbles joy. Those eyes only sparked to life when facing Grayie.

t_ch: 原来连泡泡自己都没有意识到，它不光是想要独当一面，而是想要挑战它眼中最强大的对手——{NICKNAME}！
t_en: It turns out even Bubbles didn't realize — it wasn't just about making it alone, but about challenging the one he sees as the strongest rival — {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜，风堇，你把泡泡的心思全部看穿了。
t_en: Awoo-awoo, Hyacine, you read my mind like an open book!

t_ch: 没错，{NICKNAME}，我不仅想成为你可靠的伙伴，还想让你承认我是一个不错的对手——让我们来一场真正的对决吧！
t_en: That's right, {NICKNAME}, I want to be both your reliable partner and a worthy rival — let's have a real showdown!

t_ch: *热烈的欢呼声*
t_en: *Thunderous cheering*

t_ch: 这种事，我早就知道了，来吧！
t_en: I figured as much, let's do this!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}选手积极回应了泡泡的挑战！
t_en: {NICKNAME} boldly accepts Bubbles' challenge!

t_ch: 我们的羁绊不会消失的，对吧？
t_en: Our bonds won't disappear, will it?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}选手最在意的竟然是这个问题……
t_en: That's the question that Contestant {NICKNAME} is most concerned about...

t_ch: 总之，{NICKNAME}，拿出你的最强小海豹队伍来！泡泡也会使出全部的力量。
t_en: Either way, {NICKNAME}, bring out your strongest baby seal team! I will also use my full power.

t_ch: 他们喊着友情啊羁绊啊胜利啊什么的就冲上来了…好！让我们期待庆典的最高潮，{NICKNAME}选手对战风堇选手！
t_en: They're charging in, shouting about friendship, bonds, and victory... Great! Let's look forward to the grand climax of the celebration — Contestant {NICKNAME} vs Contestant Hyacine!

t_ch: 果然，{NICKNAME}是最强劲的对手，嗷呜嗷呜~
t_en: As expected, {NICKNAME} is the strongest opponent... Awoo, awoo...

t_ch: 泡泡，最终还是被你击败了。
t_en: Bubbles lost to you in the end.

t_ch: 泡泡，别难过…你已经来到了决赛，足够向生命花园的小奇美拉们炫耀一番啦！
t_en: Bubbles, don't be too upset... You've already reached the finals, and that's more than enough to show off to the other little chimeras in the Garden of Life!

t_ch: 想必灰宝也为你的表现感到自豪吧。
t_en: I'm guessing Grayie would also be proud of your performance.

t_ch: 我家的泡泡，成长了不少呀…
t_en: My Bubbles grew up so much...

t_ch: 自信一点，你差点就战胜我了…
t_en: Be confident. You almost beat me...

t_ch: 输给冠军不丢人！
t_en: There's no shame in losing to the champion!

t_ch: 不用安慰泡泡，泡泡，才不会难过！
t_en: I don't need comforting. I will not be upset!

t_ch: 经过这一场战斗，泡泡已经完全理解了「胜利」的真正含义。
t_en: After this battle, I fully comprehend the real meaning of "victory."

t_ch: 哦，那是什么呢？
t_en: Oh, what is that?

t_ch: 那就是，<color=#dbc291ff>不是一直赢才叫追求「胜利」</color>！
t_en: That is, <color=#dbc291ff>pursuing "victory" doesn't mean always winning</color>!

t_ch: 有输有赢才是竞技比赛嘛。
t_en: Losing and winning is part of competition.

t_ch: 一想到这场比赛会输掉，泡泡也发挥出了比平时更厉害的实力。
t_en: The thought of possibly losing this match pushed me to unleash even greater strength than usual.

t_ch: 哼，我偏偏就要躺赢下去。
t_en: Hmph, I'll just sit back and win.

t_ch: 别人不知道就算了，泡泡很清楚，你为了胜利付出了更多，这是你应得的。
t_en: Others may not know this, but I know very well that you have sacrificed so much more for this victory. You deserve it.

t_ch: 过去，泡泡一直很害怕失败，一旦失败了，我所有的骄傲都会摔碎一地，但是——
t_en: In the past, I was so afraid of losing. Once I lost, all my pride would shatter across the floor, but...

t_ch: 泡泡现在走到了强者的对面！为了挑战最强的对手拼尽全力，最后大汗淋漓地失败了…这样的心情，泡泡已经知道了——还不算糟糕，不足以击垮我。
t_en: I now stand toe-to-toe with a real powerhouse! I gave it my all against the strongest opponent and lost after an exhilarating battle... I know this feeling now. It's not bad enough to defeat me.

t_ch: 泡泡还会继续追求「胜利」，直到可以和{NICKNAME}再次站在赛场上对决的一天。
t_en: I will continue to pursue victory until I can stand across the arena from {NICKNAME} once again.

t_ch: 我等着你，泡泡。
t_en: I'll be waiting, Bubbles.

t_ch: 好！希望你们俩都能得偿所愿！
t_en: Well! May you both get what you want!

t_ch: …太好了！虽然咱们奖杯丢了，仪式感不能丢，还请两位来到赛事委员方这里，让我来宣布比赛结果。
t_en: ...Great! Even though the trophy is lost, we can't lose out on the sense of ceremony. Both of you, please come in front of the competition committee, and I shall announce the results of the competition.

t_ch: 神啊！赐我们欢宴与佳酿的神！为了这份胜利的喜悦，请再赐我们浪花般翻涌不歇的掌声，我宣布，「豹豹碰碰大作战」的冠军是——
t_en: Oh, divine one! God of feasts and fine brews! In celebration of this joyous victory, grant us waves of ceaseless applause! I hereby announce that the champion of "Seal Slammers" is—

t_ch: 浴场的灯怎么黑了？怎么自然光也没了？
t_en: Why are the lights off in the baths? How is the natural light also off?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}现在什么水平，就这么几个小海豹？你泡泡一个什么奇美拉也在场上。它能撞吗？撞不了，没这个能力知道吗？
t_en: So, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} has fallen so low that their festival only attracted barely a dozen baby seals? There's even a chimera on the field — can it even slam? It's not even built for it.

t_ch: 大姐头，别这么犀利嘛，这可是决赛选手啊。
t_en: Come on, boss, don't be so harsh on them. That chimera was a finalist, after all.

t_ch: 决赛怎么了？务实一点，我劝你们，把自己战术打法，小海豹冲撞这个理念先搞懂。泡泡跟着{NICKNAME}蛮好的，你把队伍换了干什么，赢都不要了。
t_en: So what if it's the finals? Let's be real. First, you all need to get the basics down — understand what Seal Slamming is all about. Bubbles was doing great with {NICKNAME}, so why switch up the team? You don't even care about winning, do you?

t_ch: 怎么了，不让锐评两句啊？我看这现场的气氛…还不够热烈啊。
t_en: What. Can't I be blunt? The vibe here... is lacking some fire!

t_ch: 这是谁啊？
t_en: Who's this?

t_ch: 偷走奖杯的怪盗？
t_en: The thief who stole the trophy?

t_ch: 怎么了？奖杯不是你们交给我的嘛。
t_en: What's the matter? Wasn't the trophy handed over to me?

t_ch: 到底是谁邀请你了…？
t_en: Who invited you, exactly?

t_ch: 当然是不请自来的。
t_en: No one. I don't need one.

t_ch: 快把冠军的奖杯还给我！
t_en: Give me back the champion's trophy!

t_ch: 我看，没有奖杯你们不也玩得很开心嘛。
t_en: Without the trophy, you're still having a blast, aren't you?

t_ch: 重头戏还没开场，欢宴就这样匆匆忙忙地落幕了，多可惜呀！
t_en: The main event hasn't even started, and yet the celebration is already wrapping up — such a shame!

t_ch: 我有个新提议：灰子你来和我比一场，怎么样？赢了，奖杯还你；输了，奖杯归我。
t_en: Here's an idea: Gray Mystery, how about a little showdown? If you win, I'll return the trophy. If I win, the trophy's mine.

t_ch: 你甚至都没有报名比赛……
t_en: You didn't even sign up for the competition...

t_ch: 怎么，怕了？不敢接下「诡计」之半神的挑战，这「冠军」的含金量掺水了吧。
t_en: What's the matter? Scared? Too afraid to take on the demigod of Trickery? Guess that "championship" just lost some of its shine, huh?

t_ch: 她在挑衅，好明目张胆。
t_en: She's really throwing down the gauntlet, isn't she?

t_ch: 不能输啊，这可是欢宴之神的主场。
t_en: We can't afford to lose. This is the God of Banquets's home turf, after all.

t_ch: 比就比，谁怕谁？
t_en: Let's go. Who's backing down?

t_ch: 别骗我，我装了反诈软件。
t_en: Don't try to fool me. I've got anti-fraud software.

t_ch: 灰子你太可爱了，就当你同意了。
t_en: Gray Mystery, you're too adorable. Let's just pretend you agreed to it.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，请让泡泡和你一起迎战赛飞儿吧！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, have Bubbles join you and take on Ciphy!

t_ch: 太好了，你是我信任的伙伴。
t_en: Perfect, you're my trusted ally.

t_ch: 嗯嗯！面对强大的「诡计」之半神，我们要以「信任」击败她！
t_en: Mmm! Facing the mighty demigod of "Trickery," we'll defeat her with the power of "trust"!

t_ch: 泡泡，你愿意回来我身边了？
t_en: Bubbles, ready to come back to my side?

t_ch: 当然！那个金灿灿的奖杯，泡泡会帮你拿回来！
t_en: Of course I am! That glittering golden trophy... Bubbles will help you take it back!

t_ch: 再说了，泡泡已经领悟了「胜利」的真谛。现在，想再真正地赢上一回。
t_en: And don't forget, Bubbles has already figured out the true meaning of "victory." Now, it's time for a real win.

t_ch: 漂亮话差不多得了，要来就来！
t_en: Enough with the sweet talk, just bring it on!

t_ch: 总、攻、击、发动！
t_en: Full-on, attack, launch!

t_ch: 哼，{NICKNAME}，一起上吧！嗷呜嗷呜~
t_en: Hmph, {NICKNAME}, let's do this together! Awoo-awoo~

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，现在不是闲聊的时候，「豹豹碰碰大作战」全部的希望都在你身上，一定要击败那位盗贼啊！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, no time for chit-chat. The hopes of "Seal Slammers" rest entirely on you. You have to defeat that thief!

t_ch: ——完全没想到，冠军赛结束后迎来了加赛轮！
t_en: — Who could have predicted it? After the championship, we're heading into a tiebreaker round!

t_ch: 赛飞儿选手究竟会施加多少诡计，或者，制造多少意外…{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}在上！您老人家千万保佑别让{NICKNAME}选手跌进阴沟里。
t_en: How many tricks will Cipher pull off? Or how many surprises will she throw our way... By {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} above! Please bless us — don't let {NICKNAME} fall into any traps.

t_ch: 别想那么多，咱可是靠实力获胜的。
t_en: Don't think so much. We're winning through sheer power.

t_ch: 来吧，刺头海豹，该你上场了。
t_en: Alright, Spiky Seal, it's your turn to shine.

t_ch: o( (•｀ω′ • )o「看豹的模样，你们就知道豹有多不好惹了！」)∋
t_en: o( (•｀ω′ • )o "Look at my form, and you'll know just how formidable I am!" )∋

t_ch: o( (•｀ω′ • )o「豹，可是『牙刺必豹』的哦！」)∋
t_en: o( (•｀ω′ • )o "I, after all, believe in a thorn for a thorn!'" )∋

t_ch: 道理我都懂，海豹怎么这么大？
t_en: I get the theory, but why is that seal so big?

t_ch: 比赛规则没说不允许吧？
t_en: The rules didn't say anything about that, did they?

t_ch: 再说了豹越大，刺越多，刺多了，豹的比例就小了。所以豹越大，豹越小。
t_en: Besides, the bigger the seal, the more thorns it has. And when a seal has more thorns, the seal's actual body is smaller in proportion. So, the bigger the seal, the smaller the seal.

t_ch: 是…是「睚眦必报」吧？
t_en: Wait... shouldn't it be "an eye for an eye"?

t_ch: 这么认真，小海豹也没在树庭上过学呀！
t_en: You're taking this way too seriously. Baby seals don't study at the Grove!

t_ch: 在刺头海豹这里，「牙刺必豹」就是「以牙还牙，以刺还刺」的意思。
t_en: For the Spiky Seal, "a thorn for a thorn" simply means "an eye for an eye."

t_ch: 嘻嘻，灰子，看好了，让你好好瞧瞧这只扎手的小东西有多厉害。
t_en: Hehe, Gray Mystery, watch closely. Let me show you just how powerful this prickly little creature can be.

t_ch: 三弟，我、我不敢看比赛的结果，告诉我，谁赢了？
t_en: Brother, I... I can't bear to watch the result. Tell me, who won?

t_ch: <size=28>\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/！\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/！</size>
t_en: <size=28>\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/!\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/!</size>

t_ch: 嗝~你都听到了吗？是{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的欢乐，战胜了{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的诡计。
t_en: Burp~ Did you hear that? {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}'s joy triumphed over {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}'s schemes.

t_ch: o((〒ω〒; )っ「豹输了呜呜呜……」)∋
t_en: o((〒ω〒; )っ "I lost, boohoooo..." )∋

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜~你…真的是刺头海豹？你怎么比完赛物种都变了？
t_en: Awoo-woo~ Are you... really Spiky Seal? How did even your species category change after the competition?

t_ch: o((〒ω〒; )っ「豹曾是有刺海豹，现在是无刺海豹了……」)∋
t_en: o((〒ω〒; )っ "I was once a spiky seal, now it's a non-spiky seal..." )∋

t_ch: 无刺有刺，搁这玩乐队呢？
t_en: Non-spiky, spiky — what is this, a band?

t_ch: 我是乡下来奥赫玛的土「豹」，听不懂你这些流行词。
t_en: I'm a humble "seal" from the Okheman countryside. I don't understand your trendy terms.

t_ch: 它的刺都到哪里去了呢？
t_en: Where did all its thorns go?

t_ch: 哎，被生活磨平了棱角……
t_en: Ah, life wore them down...

t_ch: 不公平不公平，赛飞儿大姐头输了是有原因的——
t_en: Not fair, not fair! Cipher lost for a reason —

t_ch: 她不适应浴池…要么是太烫了，要么是太凉了，要么就是太舒服了！
t_en: She couldn't handle the bath... maybe it was too hot, too cold, or maybe just too comfy!

t_ch: 天气也不好！下雪！下雨！下冰雹！阳光太好了！又冷又热，不冷不热！
t_en: The weather was awful too! Snow! Rain! Hail! Too much sunlight! Too cold, too hot, not cold, not hot!

t_ch: 赛场因素也很多，裁判会帮你们；场外因素也很多，观众不为我们喝彩！
t_en: There were so many outside factors — referees were helping you folks, and so many external factors — no one cheered for us!

t_ch: …可以了！输了就是输了。
t_en: ...Alright, fine! A loss is a loss.

t_ch: 这次交手，我大方承认了，灰子你的确是个不能小瞧的对手——
t_en: This time, I'll admit it: Gray Mystery, you're definitely an opponent to be taken seriously.

t_ch: 我就勉为其难地说一声「恭喜」吧，冠军{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
t_en: I'll begrudgingly say "congratulations" to you, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Champion.

t_ch: 我呢，也该退场了。
t_en: As for me, it's time to make my exit.

t_ch: 不准走！你忘了什么？
t_en: Not so fast! Did you forget something?

t_ch: 我赢了，该把奖杯还我了吧？
t_en: I won, so it's time for you to return my trophy, right?

t_ch: 嚯，你这记性也太好了嘛，算啦！我就给你再表演一个，小小的魔术，看那里——
t_en: Whoa, your memory's on point. Fine, fine! Let me show you one last thing — a little magic trick. Look over there.

t_ch: 浴场的灯怎么又黑了？
t_en: Why did the lights in the bath go out again?

t_ch: *耳边悄悄话*嘿呀，灰子，你还真够执着的。
t_en: *whisper* Hey, Gray Mystery, you really don't let up, do you?

t_ch: *耳边悄悄话*「奖杯」呢…我就还给你了。
t_en: *whisper* "The trophy"... I'll give it back to you.

t_ch: *耳边悄悄话*荣誉归你，财富归我，我们俩彼此都不亏，对吧？
t_en: *whisper* Glory to you, but the riches are mine. We both win, right?

t_ch: 拜拜了您嘞。
t_en: Well, goodbye then.

t_ch: 奖杯回来了！奖杯在泡泡身边，大家快看！赛飞儿她居然说到做到！
t_en: The trophy's back! The trophy's with Bubbles — everyone, look! Cipher actually kept her word!

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜…嗷？发生了什么，刚刚，一瞬间？
t_en: Awoo awoo... huh? What happened in that split second?

t_ch: 嗝…果然，是我们的「金海豹杯」，「金海豹杯」回到了冠军手下的王牌小「海豹」这里。
t_en: Burp... As expected, it's our Gold Seal Cup. The Gold Seal Cup has returned to the champion's ace little "seal."

t_ch: 「金海豹杯」！「金海豹杯」！
t_en: Gold Seal Cup! Gold Seal Cup!

t_ch: 欢呼吧，公民们，{NICKNAME}为我们赢回了「金海豹杯」！{F#她}{M#他}是这份荣耀理所应当的拥有者！让我们再次恭喜——
t_en: Cheer, citizens! {NICKNAME} has brought the Gold Seal Cup back home for us! {F#She}{M#He} is the true and rightful bearer of this glory! Congratulations again!

t_ch: <size=28>\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/！\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/！</size>
t_en: <size=28>\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/!\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/!</size>

t_ch: 多谢，真是多谢大家的支持，我们兄弟…从没想过这次的庆典能举办得这么热闹。
t_en: Thank you. Thank you all for your incredible support. We... never thought this celebration would be this lively.

t_ch: 不仅招揽来了这么多观众，还有这么多人气选手参与，最后还夺回了丢失的奖杯。
t_en: Not only did we attract so many spectators, but so many popular competitors joined in, and in the end, we managed to reclaim the lost trophy.

t_ch: 嗝~我想为这次欢宴留下，珍藏的纪念！希望我们的冠军{NICKNAME}捧上奖杯，与来客们一起合影，嗝——
t_en: Burp~ I want to leave a lasting memory of this celebration! I hope our champion {NICKNAME} will hold up the trophy and take a photo with our guests. Burp—

t_ch: 把我拍好看点。
t_en: Make sure I look good in the shot!

t_ch: 你别喝多了手抖啊！
t_en: Don't drink too much or your hand will be shaking!

t_ch: 嗝~放心吧，等你准备好了，就带上奖杯来找我们兄弟吧！
t_en: Burp~ Don't worry. When you're ready, just bring the trophy and come find us!

t_ch: 听说合影又要喊一遍，豹豹…扑通…？
t_en: I heard we're shouting for the group photo again, seal seal... splash...?

t_ch: 小白居然还没念对，是「豹豹碰碰大作战」啦！
t_en: Snowy still didn't get it right, it's Seal Slammers!

t_ch: 小白，难道是想说，一只豹豹跳进水，扑通？
t_en: Snowy, do you mean one seal jumps into the water, splash?

t_ch: 两只豹豹跳进水，扑通扑通？
t_en: Two seals jump into the water, splish-splash?
Mmph...
Umm...

t_ch: 诶？是缇宁说话把大家冻住了吗？
t_en: Eh? Did Trinnon's words freeze everyone in place?

t_ch: 比赛结束了，泡泡，还要回生命花园吗？
t_en: The competition is over. Do I still need to go back to the Garden of Life?

t_ch: 你是怎么想的呢？泡泡。想要跟灰宝一起，还是想和小奇美拉们一起，你自己来决定。
t_en: What's your decision, Bubbles? Do you want to team up with Grayie, or would you prefer to stick with the little chimeras? It's your call.

t_ch: 嗷呜！泡泡已经能和其他小奇美拉和平相处了，但我想留在{NICKNAME}的战队里！
t_en: Awoo! Bubbles can already get along with the other little chimeras just fine, but I want to stay with {NICKNAME}'s team!

t_ch: 我就知道，灰宝是泡泡心中真正的「大英雄」。
t_en: I knew it. Grayie is the true great hero in Bubbles' heart.

t_ch: 咳…因为泡泡精力旺盛而烦恼的奇美拉饲养员们，也可以悄悄松口气了。
t_en: Ahem... The chimera caretakers who've been troubled by Bubbles' boundless energy can finally let out a sigh of relief.

t_ch: 我…到底是没赶上最后的比赛啊，咳咳……
t_en: I... I really missed the final match, didn't I? Ahem..

t_ch: 吾师，我已经有了新的对策。
t_en: Master, I've come up with a new strategy.

t_ch: 下次，我要邀请他们去高温浴池，那里才是我们悬锋人的主场。
t_en: Next time, I'll invite them to the high-temperature bath. That's us Kremnoans' true home turf.

t_ch: 后生可畏啊，好对策！
t_en: Bold and full of potential! What a clever plan!

t_ch: 冠军你来啦！我想要一张合照……
t_en: Champion, you've arrived! I'd love a photo with you...

t_ch: 你闭嘴吧。{NICKNAME}，小心这家伙，和他合照后，你就会变成「超级英雄」沐浴皂的代言人了。
t_en: Shut up. {NICKNAME}, be careful with this one. After a photo with him, you'll end up as the ambassador for Superhero Shower Soap.

t_ch: 伴着水漫琴舒缓的节奏，浴场里传来了吟游诗人的歌声…
t_en: The soothing rhythm of the water lyre blended with the voice of the bard in the bath...

t_ch: 「赐我纯金的瓯盏，赐我比金子更珍贵的佳酿…」
t_en: "Grant me a golden wine cup, and a brew more precious than gold..."

t_ch: 「赐我此日的欢乐，使我忘记昨日的忧愁…」
t_en: "Grant me today's joy, so I may forget the sorrows of yesterday..."

t_ch: 嗝~我数一二三，请大家一起喊「豹豹碰碰大作战」！
t_en: Burp, I'll count to three, and everyone shouts with me: "Seal Slammers"!

t_ch: 好啦！全部就位，都准备好了吗？
t_en: Alright! Everyone in position, are you all ready?

t_ch: 「铭记命运吧，尽管健忘的神偶尔也会忘记它，以此来捉弄世人…」
t_en: "Remember fate, though even the gods occasionally forget it to play tricks on the world..."

t_ch: 「欢歌肆饮吧，让那宁静与悲哀的归塞纳托斯，热情与欢笑的归法吉娜。」
t_en: "Sing and drink with abandon. Return the quiet sorrows to Thanatos, and let the passion and laughter of Phagousa fill the air."

t_ch: 一、二、三——
t_en: One, two, three—

t_ch: 豹豹碰碰大作战！
t_en: Seal Slammers!

t_ch: 泡泡怦怦大作战！
t_en: Bubbles' Booming Slammers!

t_ch: 茄子——
t_en: Cheese—

t_ch: 「豹豹碰碰大作战」！
t_en: "Seal Slammers"!

t_ch: 对了！其实，我们的比赛正式名字是「豹豹碰碰好玩到不行的水上小海豹冲撞对战」…终于找到机会和大家再说一遍了。
t_en: Oh, and by the way! The official name of our competition is "So Dang Fun Seal Bumping Duel Challenge Seal Slammers"... finally got the chance to say it again.

t_ch: …够了！
t_en: ...Enough!

t_ch: 与此同时，在奥赫玛某处……
t_en: At the same time, somewhere in Okhema...

t_ch: 慢走一步，赛法利娅。
t_en: Hold on, Cifera.

t_ch: 哦？是你啊，裁缝女，等到这时候才出声。不会是现在想起来要抓我吧？
t_en: Oh? It's you, seamstress. You've waited for quite a while before speaking. Don't tell me that you've just remembered to catch me now.

t_ch: …不惜编造出所谓的预言梦，也要在众目睽睽之下偷走「金海豹杯」，给我个理由。
t_en: ...You fabricated a prophetic dream just to steal the Gold Seal Cup before everyone's eyes. Tell me why.

t_ch: 你是在问一个著名小偷为什么要偷东西？所以，你到底在期待什么答案？
t_en: You're asking why a notorious thief is stealing? What kind of answer are you expecting?

t_ch: 想偷你花重金打造的宝贝，还需要理由吗？那么大的一个金灿灿的东西，多诱人哪！我贼心不死，跃跃欲试，不行吗？
t_en: Do I need a reason to steal your precious treasure? A huge sparkling gold object like this, what a temptation! Old habits die hard and there's no harm in trying, right?
Heh...

t_ch: 你，你笑什么？
t_en: Wh—What are you laughing at?

t_ch: 你还是和从前一个德行，嗯，现在我已经确定了。
t_en: You're still the same as before. Hmm, now I'm sure.

t_ch: …这还需要「怪盗的品行测试」吗？我早就知道你在用奖杯钓鱼执法了！你不也和从前一样？还是那么多弯弯绕绕的手段……
t_en: ...Do you really need to test a thief's virtue? I already knew that you were baiting me with the trophy! You haven't changed at all either. Still the same with your elusive methods...

t_ch: 哎，你就坦率一点吧，裁缝女。你其实是在担心，经过千年时光，我跟你一样慢慢流失了人性，变成所谓「非人非神」的怪物了吧？
t_en: Ah, just be honest, seamstress. You're worried about whether I've slowly lost my humanity after a millennium, and whether I've also become a monster "neither human nor divine" just like you.

t_ch: 我不辩解。
t_en: I won't explain myself.

t_ch: …千年来，我与吾师相伴时间更多，总能互相看顾。而你，赛法利娅，消失了那么久，我总得想些办法，搞清楚你是否也承受着心力磨损的苦楚……
t_en: ...In my thousand years, I've spent a long time with my teacher, taking care of one another. Yet, Cifera, you've disappeared for a long time. I had to find a way to figure out if you were also suffering as your spirit wore away.

t_ch: 别说这些，听着怪肉麻的！
t_en: Enough with all this! How mushy!

t_ch: 很可惜，我从来就没变。千年前我会偷走你的宝贝，千年后我大发慈悲，照偷不误。
t_en: What a pity that I haven't changed at all! I would steal from you a thousand years ago, and rejoice! I would still steal from you a thousand years later.

t_ch: 我可是活得比你有滋有味多了！你要是有空关心我，不如多关心关心你自己吧！
t_en: I lead a far more exciting life than you! If you've got the time to worry about me, worry about yourself instead!

t_ch: 戳到痛处了？算了，我也给你交个底吧——
t_en: Did I hit a nerve? Forget it, I'll be honest with you —

t_ch: 我想近距离交个手，探一探这位{NICKNAME}到底是个什么样的人，怎么就搅和到了你的逐火大业里，让你不惜花重金也要找我出手帮忙。
t_en: I want to fight {NICKNAME} up close and find out what kind of person {F#she}{M#he} is. How did {F#she}{M#he} meddle with your Flame-Chase cause and get you to spend a fortune for my help?

t_ch: 呵，那败在{F#她}{M#他}手中的怪盗大人，现在有结论了吗？
t_en: Hah, then pray tell, master thief who was defeated by {F#her}{M#him}. What's your conclusion?

t_ch: 哼哼，{NICKNAME}嘛，算是个有趣的{F#女孩}{M#男孩}。
t_en: Heheh, {NICKNAME} is quite an interesting {F#girl}{M#guy}.

t_ch: ——不过，我只是输了比赛，可没承认自己真的败了。
t_en: — But I've only lost the competition. I didn't admit that I had been truly defeated.

t_ch: 嗯？什么意思？你还回去的奖杯……
t_en: Hmm? What does that mean? Are you saying the trophy that you returned...

t_ch: 还的到底是真品还是仿品，你自己猜一猜喽！
t_en: Is it real or counterfeit? Take a guess for yourself!

t_ch: 小灰，你来啦！*我们*想问问你，最近有没有做什么<color=#dbc291ff>特别的梦</color>呢？
t_en: Little Gray, you're here! We want to ask you — have you had any... special dreams lately?

t_ch: 我睡眠质量好，一般不做梦。
t_en: I sleep well, so I don't usually dream.

t_ch: 那还真是健康呢。
t_en: Well, that's quite healthy.

t_ch: 上次旅行刚做完「太一之梦」。
t_en: I just had the "Ena's Dream" during my last trip.

t_ch: 换句话说，到奥赫玛之后没怎么做梦？
t_en: So, you haven't had any dreams since arriving in Okhema?

t_ch: 阿雅和*我们*都担心，小灰接受了{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福后，会不会得到具有启示作用的<color=#dbc291ff>预言梦</color>。
t_en: We and Agy are worried that after receiving the blessing of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, you might have had some prophetic dreams.

t_ch: 预言梦…是什么梦？
t_en: Prophetic dreams? What is a "prophetic dream"?

t_ch: 举个例子，奥赫玛历史上曾有位联军统帅做过一个梦：梦见一只雄鹰飞来，抓起了母鹿和它的幼崽，最后这只雄鹰却被乌鸦攻击，并被啄死。
t_en: For example, in Okhema's history, there was a general of the alliance who once had a dream: In the dream, an eagle swooped down, and caught a doe and her fawn, but was attacked and pecked to death by crows in the end.

t_ch: 而后他才知道那是一场有关战争的<color=#dbc291ff>预言</color>——雄鹰代表联军，母鹿和幼崽代表敌人，乌鸦则象征着战争的残酷和无常。
t_en: After that, he realized that dream was a <color=#dbc291ff>prophecy</color> about the war. The eagle represented the allied forces, the doe and her fawn represented the enemies and their allies, and the crows symbolized the cruelty and unpredictability of war.

t_ch: （努力回想最近的梦）
t_en: (Struggles to recall a recent dream)

t_ch: 什么都想不起来。
t_en: I can't remember anything.

t_ch: 那是一场战争进程和结局的<color=#dbc291ff>预言</color>。雄鹰代表着联军，母鹿和幼崽代表敌人及其盟友，乌鸦则象征着战争的残酷和不确定性。
t_en: That dream was a <color=#dbc291ff>prophecy</color> of the course and outcome of a war. The eagle represented the allied forces, the doe and her fawn represented the enemies and their allies, and the crows symbolized the cruelty and unpredictability of war.

t_ch: 梦中一切，都在现实中实现了…如果小灰有过类似的梦境，要千万留意呀。
t_en: Everything in the dream came true in reality... If you had a similar dream, Little Gray, you should pay close attention.

t_ch: 小灰没有印象，那我们就不担心了。阿雅，既然一切如常，该说说我们的正事了吧？
t_en: Little Gray doesn't remember anything, so we won't worry. Agy, since everything is fine, let's talk shop, shall we?

t_ch: 这是一件郑重的事情，一年的欢喜月又到了——信仰{RUBY_B#法吉娜}欢宴之神{RUBY_E#}的密底斯泰歇人打算在三季海庭举办一场<color=#dbc291ff>水上狂欢节</color>。
t_en: This is serious business. It's the Month of Joy once again — followers of {RUBY_B#Phagousa}the God of Banquets{RUBY_E#} from Mythemis are planning to hold a <color=#dbc291ff>Water Carnival</color> at the Court of Seasons.

t_ch: 名字叫作…<color=#dbc291ff>「豹豹碰碰大作战」</color>。
t_en: It's called... <color=#dbc291ff>"Seal Slammers."</color>

t_ch: 我以奥赫玛「金织」的名义，托大工匠哈托努斯打造了一樽<color=#dbc291ff>「金海豹杯」</color>，作为比赛胜者的奖赏——
t_en: By the name of the "Goldweaver" of Okhema, I've commissioned the Grand Craftsman Chartonus to create a <color=#dbc291ff>"Gold Seal Cup"</color> to be awarded to the winner of the competition —

t_ch: 这是一场盛会，也许我们的客人会感兴趣？
t_en: This is a grand event. Perhaps our distinguished guest might be interested?

t_ch: 感兴趣！我想要奖励！
t_en: I'm interested! I want rewards!

t_ch: 看来我是问对人了。
t_en: Sounds like I've asked the right person.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅大人发动了钞能力！
t_en: Lady Aglaea uses her kaching superpower again!

t_ch: 一点心意，只能算是东道主的薄礼。
t_en: It's a small token. Just a humble gesture from the host.

t_ch: 又是一堆小解谜？我不想玩啊！
t_en: Another bunch of puzzle minigames? I'm not in the mood for that!

t_ch: 放心，这并非是解谜，而是竞赛。
t_en: Don't worry. This isn't a puzzle — it's a competition.

t_ch: 尽管远方的黑潮尚在威胁，但我们也希望奥赫玛的公民们，能借着比赛，畅快地宣泄心中压抑已久的情绪。
t_en: Even though the threat of black tide still looms, we hope that the citizens of Okhema can use this competition to release the pent-up emotions they've been holding in for so long.

t_ch: 作为黄金裔的贵客，我也希望你能尽情借此深入领略一番奥赫玛的风情。
t_en: As the esteemed guest of the Chrysos Heirs, I hope you can immerse yourself into the culture of Okhema with this experience.

t_ch: 如果小灰感兴趣的话，明天就去浴场报名比赛吧。
t_en: If Little Gray is interested, sign up at the baths tomorrow.

t_ch: 时间也不早了，希望小灰有个好梦。*我们*告辞了，期待明天和你赛场见哦！
t_en: It's getting late. Hope you have a good dream tonight, Little Gray. We'll take our leave now. See you at the venue tomorrow!

t_ch: 原来重头戏在后面？
t_en: So the real plot unfolds now?

t_ch: 说吧，有什么事找我？
t_en: Speak, what's the matter?

t_ch: 虽然这个名字，还真是法吉娜信徒的品味，不过，阿雅给的奖励可是很郑！重！的哦！
t_en: Though that name really does have the taste of Phagousa's disciples, the reward from Agy is quite... serious!

t_ch: 阳光有些刺眼，不过…你早有准备——眼罩，正是为了此刻而存在的。
t_en: The sun is a bit blinding, but... you came prepared — your eye mask is just for this moment.

t_ch: 晚安，希望今晚能有<color=#dbc291ff>预言梦</color>。
t_en: Good night, and maybe there will be a <color=#dbc291ff>prophetic dream</color> tonight.

t_ch: <unbreak>也许是借由阿格莱雅和缇宝的暗示，你的*预言梦*——它来了。</unbreak>
t_en: Perhaps influenced by the hints from Aglaea and Tribbie, your prophetic dream has arrived.

t_ch: 醒一醒……
t_en: Wake up...

t_ch: 醒一醒……
t_en: Wake up...

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}. {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我是欢宴与海洋之泰坦，满溢之杯，法吉娜。我正在呼唤你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I am Phagousa, the Titan of Banquets and Oceans, Chalice of Plenty. I am calling you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 哎，什么情况？你给我干哪儿来了，这还是我的浴宫吗？
t_en: Huh, what's going on? Where did you take me? Is this still my bath chamber?

t_ch: 这，是你的<color=#dbc291ff>预言梦</color>。而你{NICKNAME}，是「预言之子」。
t_en: This is your <color=#dbc291ff>prophetic dream</color>. And you, {NICKNAME}, are the "Child of Prophecy."

t_ch: 看看你的周围吧。一夜之间，奥赫玛的人类水平下降了一万倍——
t_en: Look around. In one night, the humans in Okhema have decreased their capacities by ten thousandfold—

t_ch: 全人类都退化成了小海豹，就连黄金裔们也不能幸免。
t_en: All humans have regressed into baby seals. Even the Chrysos Heirs are not spared.

t_ch: 你要肩负起「预言之子」的责任，你要去拯救他们。
t_en: You must take up the responsibility of the Child of Prophecy. You must save them.

t_ch: 这样的危机是不是有点激进了？
t_en: Isn't this crisis a little extreme?

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的危机从来不止于一种。
t_en: The crisis of Amphoreus is never just one thing.

t_ch: 那人类能是小海豹进化来的吗？
t_en: Then are humans evolved from baby seals?

t_ch: 翁法罗斯可没有那么严谨的进化论。
t_en: Amphoreus doesn't care about such strict theories of evolution.

t_ch: 所以，为什么法吉娜会找上我？
t_en: So, why did you come to me, Phagousa?

t_ch: 那是因为，你是能够拯救所有小海豹的「预言之子」。
t_en: Because you are the Child of Prophecy who can save all the baby seals.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>而你要去参加「豹豹碰碰大作战」，并获得最终的冠军奖杯。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And you must take part in Seal Slammers and win the final trophy.</color>

t_ch: 如此一来，所有的人类，所有的{RUBY_B#法吉娜圣兽}小海豹{RUBY_E#}才会得到拯救。
t_en: Only then will all the humans and all the {RUBY_B#Sacred Beasts of Phagousa}baby seals{RUBY_E#} be saved.

t_ch: …不信任我的预言吗？你若心存猜疑，小海豹的危机终将到来。我，在此预言——
t_en: ...You don't believe in my prophecy? If you keep up your doubts and hesitations, the baby seal crisis will become inevitable. I hereby prophesize —

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>你若不能取得奖杯，你将永远变成小海豹。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>If you don't win the trophy, you will turn into a baby seal and stay that way forever.</color>

t_ch: 怎么还有条失败路线的预言？
t_en: How can there be a prophecy for the bad end?

t_ch: 总得有一条预言要实现，这样比较严谨。
t_en: There has to be one prophecy that will come true — that's more rigorous.

t_ch: …感觉成为一只小海豹也不错。
t_en: ...Becoming a baby seal doesn't seem that bad.

t_ch: 倘若预言也不能使你警醒起来，我会让你在梦里切身体会一番。
t_en: If even the prophecy doesn't alarm you, then I'll make you experience it in the dream.

t_ch: 突然你感觉像是从高处摔了下来，掉在了地面上。
t_en: Suddenly, you feel like you're falling from a great height, crashing onto the ground.

t_ch: o((◉ω◉ ! )o「救命！我怎么变成海豹了？！」)∋
t_en: o((◉ω◉ ! )o "Help! Why did I turn into a seal!?" )∋

t_ch: o((〒ω〒; )o「救命！我被海豹包围了！」)∋
t_en: o((〒ω〒; )o "Help! I'm surrounded by seals!" )∋

t_ch: 现在，你是否能够深刻理解*这迫在眉睫的危机*呢？
t_en: Now, do you understand the imminent danger?

t_ch: o((〒ω〒; )o「我理解了」)∋
t_en: o((〒ω〒; )o "I understand." )∋

t_ch: o((-'ω´- )o「就这样挺好…」)∋
t_en: o((-'ω´- )o "This feels just fine..." )∋

t_ch: 你完全没有理解。
t_en: You haven't understood it at all.

t_ch: 你若失败，你会变成小海豹，而我无法保证你会变成怎样的小海豹——
t_en: If you fail, you'll become a baby seal, and I can't guarantee what kind of baby seal you'll turn into.

t_ch: 你变成这样活蹦乱跳、会说会笑的小海豹，基础概率是<unbreak>0.6%</unbreak>。
t_en: The base chance of you turning into a lively, speaking, and laughing baby seal is <unbreak>0.6%</unbreak>.

t_ch: 而你变成那些<color=#eb4d3dff>不会说不会笑、摆在货架上的小海豹</color>，基础概率是<color=#eb4d3dff><unbreak>99.4%</unbreak></color>。
t_en: However, the base chance of you turning into an <color=#eb4d3dff>inert and passive baby seal for display on the shelves</color> is <color=#eb4d3dff><unbreak>99.4%</unbreak></color>.

t_ch: o((◉ω◉ ! )o「那不是玩偶吗？」)∋
t_en: o((◉ω◉ ! )o "I turn into a plushie!?" )∋

t_ch: o((='ω´=; )o「你是在威胁我？」)∋
t_en: o((='ω´=; )o "Are you threatening me?" )∋

t_ch: …我们闲聊太久了，快看！你的敌人已经来了！
t_en: ...We've spent too long chit-chatting. Look, your enemy is here!

t_ch: 小海豹们的末日到了！
t_en: Baby seals, your end is neigh!

t_ch: 那是迫害海豹王国的邪恶统领——黑厄！
t_en: That's Pie-non — the evil mastermind trying to bring down the Seal Kingdom!

t_ch: 我就是黑厄，看啊！我与这些归降于我的小海豹叛徒们，组成了「黑厄势力」！
t_en: I am Pie-non. Behold my legion of baby seal turncoats! Together, we are Pie-non's Legion!

t_ch: o((^'ω´^ )o「吼吼吼，臣服于我们黑厄大人吧」)∋
t_en: o((^'ω´^ )o "Ho-ho-ho! That's right, submit yourselves to our great Lord Pie-non!" )∋

t_ch: 白厄你要是被绑架了就眨眨眼。
t_en: Phainon, blink twice if you need help.

t_ch: 闭嘴，「预言之子」！我是黑厄。
t_en: Silence, Child of Prophecy! I am Pie-non.

t_ch: 你这浓眉大眼的怎么也叛变了？
t_en: I can't believe someone like you would switch sides.

t_ch: 我本来就是入侵者，何来叛变一说？
t_en: I was always the invader. There was never any side-switching.

t_ch: 那个…我是不是…又变回人了？
t_en: Wait... am I human again?

t_ch: …这不是重点，跳过。
t_en: ...That's not what's important right now.

t_ch: 你无需害怕，你还有值得信赖的海豹伙伴。看，这位就是传说中的异邦勇者。
t_en: There's no need to fear. You still have trusty seal companions to depend on. Behold, the outlander warrior of legends.

t_ch: 嗷呜～看来你就是「预言之子」，我是奇美拉泡泡。
t_en: Awooo!~ So you are the Child of Prophecy. I am Bubbles the Chimera.

t_ch: 与我一同，成为英雄吧！
t_en: Stand with me and become heroes!

t_ch: 白厄，你的台词被抢走了！
t_en: Phainon, they stole your line!

t_ch: 我不是白厄，我是黑厄，我是最强黑厄！
t_en: I told you, I'm not Phainon! I am Pie-non, the ultimate Pie-non!

t_ch: 教学关是吧？我懂了。
t_en: Time for another tutorial stage, right? Got it.

t_ch: 嗷呜～看来你是名无师自通的「预言之子」。
t_en: Awooo~ You're a fast learner, Child of Prophecy.

t_ch: 那金色奖杯早已是黑厄势力的囊中之物，「预言之子」你什么也无法改变——！
t_en: That golden trophy already belongs to Pie-non's Legion. You're too late, Child of Prophecy!

t_ch: 半场开香槟，等着被翻盘吧！
t_en: Not so fast. Time to play my reverse card!

t_ch: 别废话，先和我较量较量！
t_en: Cut the chatter, face me in battle!

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜～认输吧，黑厄势力！
t_en: Awooo, awooo! Give up now, Pie-non's Legion!

t_ch: 怎么会这样…这不过是预言梦境。我并没有真正输给你……
t_en: Impossible... This is but a prophetic dream. I haven't lost yet...!

t_ch: o((-'ω´- )o「这里是海豹王国，该滚的是你们吧！」)∋
t_en: o((-'ω´- )o "This is our Seal Kingdom. You're the one who should leave!" )∋

t_ch: o((•'ω´• )o「我们有『预言之子』在，不会任人欺负」)∋
t_en: o((•'ω´• )o "The Prophesied One is with us! We won't take your bullying anymore!" )∋

t_ch: 可恶！我们撤退！给我记住了，「预言之子」{NICKNAME}——
t_en: Curses! Fall back! I'll remember this, {NICKNAME}, Child of Prophecy—

t_ch: 叫作「黑厄」的对手狼狈离开了，你不必有任何疑惑，梦本来就是乱七八糟的东西。
t_en: The opponent called Pie-non stumbles away in defeat. There's no need to feel confused, for dreams are chaotic by nature.

t_ch: 铭记你的胜利吧，此次战役被后世的小海豹们称为「天地裂变之战的序篇」。
t_en: Remember your victory. This battle shall be remembered as the "Prologue to the Cataclysmic War" by the baby seals to come.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，现在的你是否有决心赢下奖杯？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, have you found the resolve to win the trophy?

t_ch: 我感觉到了一种奇特的史诗感。
t_en: I am filled with a peculiar epicness.

t_ch: 这是独属于你的史诗故事。
t_en: This is your very own epic saga.

t_ch: 不整这出，我也会赢下比赛的…
t_en: I didn't need this extra motivation to win...

t_ch: 这不是怕你没有目标感和紧迫感嘛。
t_en: Having an objective and some pressure never hurts.

t_ch: 我已经下定决心不参加比赛了！
t_en: I've decided to quit!

t_ch: 那么<color=#eb4d3dff>你将永远变成小海豹。</color>你要想清楚代价……
t_en: Then <color=#eb4d3dff>you will turn into a baby seal and stay that way forever.</color> Make your choice wisely...

t_ch: 嗷呜～好伙伴，在你醒来之前，请让我为你介绍海豹国的勇士们——
t_en: Awooo~ Before you wake up, partner, allow me to introduce the brave warriors of the Seal Kingdom—

t_ch: 你知道的，大力海豹是我的兄弟，我们曾并肩作战击败过许多对手。
t_en: As you know, Mega Seal is my buddy. We've defeated many opponents side-by-side.

t_ch: o((•'ω´• )っ「兄弟兄弟！力中豹力！」)∋
t_en: o((•'ω´• )っ "Buddy in arms! Goooo seal power!" )∋

t_ch: 我和这只橡胶海豹很早就认识了，这家伙强得不可思议。
t_en: I've known this Rubber Seal for a long time. It's astonishingly strong.

t_ch: o((•'ω´- )っ「我是要成为海豹王的豹豹~」)∋
t_en: o((•'ω´- )っ "I'm the seal who will become the Seal King!~" )∋

t_ch: 嗷呜～也许梦醒来之后，我们不会记得你是谁，但你可千万记得要来找我们呀。
t_en: Awooo! Maybe we won't remember who you are when this dream ends, but please remember to come find us.

t_ch: o((>'ω´< )っ「可别忘了我们~」)∋
t_en: o((>'ω´< )っ "Don't you forget about us~" )∋

t_ch: 我忘了法吉娜也不会忘了你们！
t_en: I'll forget Phagousa before I forget you!

t_ch: 有点受伤又有点感动。
t_en: Ouch... but very touching.

t_ch: 原来，我们根本就不认识彼此…
t_en: So we never knew each other...

t_ch: 你在预言里见过它们，这便足以重新认识了。
t_en: You've seen them in the prophecy. That will help you recognize each other again.

t_ch: 在你彻底醒来之前，我还有最后三件事要叮嘱你。
t_en: Before you go, I have three final reminders for you.

t_ch: 第一，也许你不相信预言梦，但你将有机会验证它——
t_en: Firstly, maybe you don't believe in prophetic dreams, but you will have the chance to witness it come true —

t_ch: 三大预言灾厄会依次发生——「黑潮蚀清波」、「巨兽卧沉渊」…
t_en: The three prophesied disasters will happen in order: The black tide muddles clear waters, the giant beast rests in the abyss...

t_ch: 在那之后，是<color=#eb4d3dff>「金杯终破碎，无人成冠军」。</color>
t_en: And finally, <color=#eb4d3dff>the golden trophy shatters with no champion.</color>

t_ch: 那不就没法实现预言了？
t_en: Then... the prophecy can't be fulfilled.

t_ch: 所以，我要叮嘱你的第二件事，便是要你召集伙伴对抗命运。
t_en: That's why my second reminder is for you to rally companions and stand against fate.

t_ch: 带着帽子、墨镜、泳圈的奇美拉「泡泡」，它是预言中的异邦勇士，会助你胜利。
t_en: Bubbles, the chimera wearing a hat, sunglasses, and swimming ring, is the prophesied outlander warrior. It will lead you to victory.

t_ch: 还有位身手矫捷的游侠，你要找到她，她会带着那金色奖杯骗过命运，不再破碎。
t_en: As well as the dexterous ranger. You must find her. She will carry the golden trophy and cheat fate, so that it'll no longer break.

t_ch: 你说的这游侠，是谁呢？
t_en: Who is this ranger you speak of?

t_ch: …不会恰好是赛飞儿吧？
t_en: ...It's not Cipher, is it?

t_ch: 那便是唯一的机会，你需要自己弄清楚。
t_en: That's your only chance. You'll have to figure it out yourself.

t_ch: 第三件事最为重要，你千万要记住——
t_en: My third reminder is the most important, so do well to remember —

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>你不可将预言梦告诉任何人，否则你将变成小海豹。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>You must not tell anyone about the prophetic dream. If you do, you'll turn into a baby seal.</color>

t_ch: 即便那是「金织」、「信使」，亦或是你将要召集的伙伴——任何人，谁都不行。
t_en: Not even to the Goldweaver or the Messenger or any of your companions to come. Tell no one.

t_ch: 嗷呜～你放心吧，泡泡就算不知道预言梦中的一切，还是会帮你的！
t_en: Awooo!~ Fret not. Bubbles will aid you even if you keep the dream a secret!

t_ch: 泡泡，噢，我的泡泡。
t_en: Oh Bubbles, my Bubbles.

t_ch: 嗷呜～相信我们会成为心照不宣的好伙伴的。
t_en: Awooo~ I believe we will become the best of partners.

t_ch: 泡泡不会记得这个梦吗？
t_en: Won't Bubbles remember this dream?

t_ch: 这是你的梦，不是泡泡的梦。
t_en: This dream is yours only.

t_ch: 好了，你差不多该醒来了。
t_en: Alright, it's about time you wake up.

t_ch: 在你忘记前，请再次记住你的预言梦——
t_en: Before you forget, I urge you to remember the prophetic dream again —

t_ch: 「你会参加并赢下比赛，拯救所有人和所有小海豹。否则，你将永远成为一只小海豹。」
t_en: "You will participate and win the tournament. You will rescue everyone, as well as all the baby seals. If you fail, you will forever be stuck as a baby seal."

t_ch: 嘿，好搭档。你总算醒了。
t_en: Hey partner. You're finally awake.

t_ch: …陌生的天花板啊。
t_en: ...Ah, an unfamiliar ceiling.

t_ch: 我们都在看着你，你就只看天花板啊。
t_en: Enough about the ceiling. All eyes are on you now.

t_ch: …啊，黑厄势力还在追我？
t_en: ...Oh no. Pie-non's Legion has found me.

t_ch: 黑厄势力？你在说什么？
t_en: Pie-non's Legion? What are you talking about?

t_ch: …杀害我的凶手是赛飞儿…呃。
t_en: ...The one who murdered me is... Cipher... Urk.

t_ch: 你还活着，别急着留下遗言了。
t_en: You're not dead yet. Let's take it easy with the last words, yeah?

t_ch: 灰宝，地板上太凉了，你还是快起来吧。
t_en: Grayie, it's too cold on the floor. Better to get up.

t_ch: 我向你介绍一下，这是来自密底斯泰歇的三兄弟——阿水菲斯，阿波菲斯，阿淼菲斯…他们是这次{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}狂欢节的主办方。
t_en: Let me introduce them to you. They are the Mythemis Brothers — Aquafis, Apophis, and Amorphis. They are the organizers of this {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} Festival.

t_ch: 虽然我不知道你为什么会躺在这，不过赶早不如赶巧，我们正好在聊——
t_en: I don't know how you ended up here, but better now than never. We were just talking about —

t_ch: 那个小海豹的比赛…?
t_en: The Baby Seals tournament...?

t_ch: 看来阿格莱雅已经告诉你了，就是那个豹豹…碰碰什么比赛。
t_en: Looks like Aglaea already told you. Yes, the... something something Seal Slammers tournament.

t_ch: …说到这里，多亏了「金织」大人送来的奖杯，点燃了大家的参赛热情，真是太感谢了！
t_en: Speaking of, Lady Goldweaver has our utmost gratitude for the trophy. It ignited everyone's passion for the tournament!

t_ch: 毕竟{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的诞辰怎么能缺少了欢宴与庆贺呢？阿格莱雅希望更多的人参与其中，同享来自密底斯泰歇的欢乐。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} birthday won't be complete without festivities and celebrations after all. Lady Aglaea wants more people to be involved and share the joy of Mythemis.

t_ch: …要不是我无暇抽身，我也想亲自参加的。
t_en: ...If I wasn't so occupied, I would've loved to join in myself.

t_ch: 幸好现在有了更佳的人选——所以，好搭档，你愿意参加吗？
t_en: Luckily, you now have an even better candidate. So, dear partner — Would you care to participate?

t_ch: 我要是不参加，会有生命危险。
t_en: If I don't, I could lose my life.

t_ch: 生、生命危险？啊…你不用亲自去冲撞的…啊不对？我是说反了吗？
t_en: L—Lose your life? You don't need to do the slamming yourself. Hold on... Did I get it wrong?

t_ch: 白厄阁下，你就忽略掉这些怪话，就当{F#她}{M#他}同意了吧。
t_en: Lord Phainon, pay the ramblings no mind. Just pretend that {F#she}{M#he} said yes.

t_ch: 这有点突然，让我再考虑考虑。
t_en: I must consider this sudden proposal.

t_ch: （其实已经没有退路了，但说出「考虑考虑」就有种深思熟虑的感觉。）
t_en: (There really is no way out of this, but at least saying that gives you some character depth.)

t_ch: 想想比赛的奖品。
t_en: Think of the prizes.

t_ch: 你都不敢想，要是自己拿到了「金海豹杯」该有多幸福。
t_en: You can't even imagine how happy you'd be if you got the Gold Seal Cup.

t_ch: 想想遥远的三月七。
t_en: Think of March 7th, far away.

t_ch: 她一定很想要张《你与奖杯的合影》吧。
t_en: She would love to have a photo of you and the trophy.

t_ch: 想想「开拓」的使命。
t_en: Think of the Trailblazing duty.

t_ch: 杨叔说过，「金海豹杯」也是我的「开拓」对象。
t_en: Mr. Yang said the Gold Seal Cup is also a subject of my Trailblazing.

t_ch: 我这么厉害，必须参加。
t_en: I'm so good, I simply have to participate.

t_ch: 太好了，我就知道你会来参加！
t_en: Wonderful! I knew you'd come through.

t_ch: 对不起，我已决心不参加比赛…
t_en: Sorry, but I've decided to call it quits...

t_ch: 冷静一下，避免你已经忘记了前不久那个荒唐的梦境，我必须要提醒你一下。
t_en: Hold right there. In case you've already forgotten about that silly dream, here's an obligatory reminder from me:

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>不参加比赛，就无法得到奖杯。没有奖杯，你将永远变成小海豹。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>No participation means no trophy. No trophy means you will turn into a baby seal and stay that way forever. Forever.</color>

t_ch: 真的吗？不要太害怕输赢结果，重要的是参与……
t_en: Really? Don't sweat too much about the results. It's the process that matters...

t_ch: 我开玩笑的，我必须参加。
t_en: I'm kidding. I must participate.

t_ch: 太好了，我就知道你会来参加！
t_en: Wonderful! I knew you'd come through.

t_ch: 我决心已定，不参加比赛。
t_en: I've made up my mind about quitting.

t_ch: 我明白了，我们也不会强求。
t_en: Understood. We won't force you to.

t_ch: 许多年之后，面对逐火之旅的终局，{NICKNAME}会回想起，被询问是否参加「豹豹碰碰大作战」的那个遥远的上午。
t_en: Many years later, when facing the finale of the Flame-Chase Journey, {NICKNAME} recalls that distant morning, so long ago, when {F#she}{M#he} was asked to participate in Seal Slammers.

t_ch: 当人们谈论起逐火之旅的时候，会理所当然地想起那十二名伟大的黄金裔，以及一名可爱的小海豹。
t_en: When people speak of the Flame-Chase Journey, the twelve great Chrysos Heirs naturally come to mind, along with an adorable baby seal.

t_ch: 好搭档，喂——别走神了。
t_en: Hey partner. Are you still here?

t_ch: 我开玩笑的，我必须参加。
t_en: I'm kidding. I must participate.

t_ch: 太好了，我就知道你会来参加！
t_en: Wonderful! I knew you'd come through.

t_ch: 朋友们，法吉娜给我托梦了…
t_en: Friends, Phagousa revealed to me in a dream...

t_ch: 冷静一下，避免你已经忘记了前不久那个荒唐的梦境，我必须要提醒你一下。
t_en: Hold right there. In case you've already forgotten about that silly dream, here's an obligatory reminder from me:

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff>将预言梦告诉他人，你将永远变成小海豹。</color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff>If you tell anyone about the prophetic dream, you will turn into a baby seal and stay that way forever.</color>

t_ch: …海洋之泰坦，给你托梦说了什么？
t_en: ...What did the Ocean Titan reveal to you in the dream?

t_ch: 谁敢不让我参加，就把他带走。
t_en: Divine wrath be upon anyone who stops me from joining.

t_ch: 好家伙，这还是生死局。请你一定要参加！
t_en: Goodness, a do-or-die situation. Please do participate, then!

t_ch: …我会变成一只可爱的小海豹！
t_en: ...That I'll turn into an adorable baby seal!

t_ch: 嗯？什么意思，我不太明白……
t_en: Huh? I don't understand...

t_ch: 许多年之后，面对逐火之旅的终局，{NICKNAME}会回想起，被询问是否参加「豹豹碰碰大作战」的那个遥远的上午。
t_en: Many years later, when facing the finale of the Flame-Chase Journey, {NICKNAME} recalls that distant morning, so long ago, when {F#she}{M#he} was asked to participate in Seal Slammers.

t_ch: 当人们谈论起逐火之旅的时候，会理所当然地想起那十二名伟大的黄金裔，以及一名可爱的小海豹。
t_en: When people speak of the Flame-Chase Journey, the twelve great Chrysos Heirs naturally come to mind, along with an adorable baby seal.

t_ch: 好搭档，喂——别走神了。
t_en: Hey partner. Are you still here?

t_ch: 我开玩笑的，我必须参加。
t_en: I'm kidding. I must participate.

t_ch: 太好了，我就知道你会来参加！
t_en: Wonderful! I knew you'd come through.

t_ch: 哦，刚才我们说到哪儿了？
t_en: Oh, where were we again?

t_ch: 既然灰宝准备参加比赛，你就把这孩子带上吧。
t_en: Since Grayie has decided to participate in the tournament, you should take this little one with you.

t_ch: 它叫泡泡，是生命花园培育出来的小奇美拉，精力旺盛又爱闹腾，学者们都拿它没办法。
t_en: This is Bubbles, a little chimera raised in the Garden of Life. It's energetic and quite the trouble-maker. The scholars simply don't know what to do with it.

t_ch: 带着帽子、墨镜、泳圈的奇美拉——「泡泡」？！
t_en: Bubbles, the chimera wearing a hat, sunglasses, and swimming ring!?

t_ch: 嗷呜…你认识我吗？或者，我认识你吗？
t_en: Awooo? You know me? Or... do I know you?

t_ch: （预言中的异邦勇者出现了…！）
t_en: (The prophesied outlander warrior...!)

t_ch: 泡泡，噢，我的泡泡。
t_en: Oh Bubbles, my Bubbles.

t_ch: 嗷呜，突然这是什么意思？
t_en: Awooo? What's the meaning of this?

t_ch: {F#她}{M#他}已经把你算进队伍里了。
t_en: {F#She}{M#He} already considers you a part of the team.

t_ch: 好泡泡！快来救我啊！
t_en: Good Bubbles, save me!

t_ch: 嗷呜，我来助你！
t_en: Awooo! You can count on me!

t_ch: …可是它什么也不会，真的能行吗？
t_en: ...But it doesn't know anything. Is this going to work?

t_ch: 嗷呜~居然看扁泡泡，小海豹能行，泡泡怎么不行！
t_en: Awooo~ You look down on Bubbles! Anything the baby seals can do, Bubbles can do better!

t_ch: 那你俩可得好好加油了，毕竟你们是我推荐的选手，如果一轮游了，会显得我……
t_en: I guess you two will have to break a sweat. I'm vouching for you after all. If you get defeated in the first round, my reputation will...

t_ch: 泡泡绝不会让{NICKNAME}输的，我已经感受到了，我们有种命中注定的默契！
t_en: Bubbles won't let {NICKNAME} lose. I can already feel it. Our incredible teamwork is written in destiny!

t_ch: 太好啦！泡泡，你跟着灰宝去参加比赛，肯定能有所收获。
t_en: That's great! With Grayie, you are sure to learn a lot in the tournament, Bubbles.

t_ch: 好！{NICKNAME}记入参赛选手。各位，敬请期待我们的比赛吧！
t_en: Then it's settled! {NICKNAME} has been recorded as a contestant. Everyone, please look forward to our tournament!

t_ch: 一段时间后，密底斯泰歇三兄弟布置好了水上狂欢节的现场，「豹豹碰碰大作战」正式开始了。
t_en: After some time, the Mythemis Brothers finished setting up the venue for the festival, and the Seal Slammers officially began.

t_ch: …哇！小灰，*我们*就知道你会来。
t_en: Wow! Little Gray, we knew you'd come.

t_ch: 刚才*我们*还看到…跑得很快的小飞儿。
t_en: Just now, we saw... Little Ciphy running past.

t_ch: 赛飞儿？
t_en: Cipher?

t_ch: 飞霄？
t_en: Ciphy-roth?

t_ch: 不，你说的人*我们*不认识。*我们*说的是赛飞儿！
t_en: No. We don't know who that is. We mean Cipher!

t_ch: 小飞儿总是躲着阿雅，*我们*连她的影子也捉不到，她应该不会来参加比赛吧。
t_en: Little Ciphy is always hiding from Agy. We can't even catch her shadow. She's probably not participating.

t_ch: …*我们*还是说回比赛吧。
t_en: ...Anyway, we should go back to the tournament.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}选手，你来得正好，比赛分组出来了——你和缇宝大人分到了一组，缇宁大人分到了另外的组。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're just in time. The matchups are out. You are in the same group as Lady Tribbie. Lady Trinnon has been assigned to another group.

t_ch: 那*我们*和小灰是同组对决的对手啦！
t_en: Then we will go against Little Gray in the same group!

t_ch: 我还得提醒一句，仅有一只小奇美拉和一只普通灰豹是不够的，正式比赛需要至少<color=#dbc291ff>三只海豹</color>。{NICKNAME}选手，你有那个吗？就是那个——
t_en: I must remind you that it's not enough to simply have a Little Chimera and a Common Gray Seal. You'll need at least <color=#dbc291ff>three seals</color> for the official competition. {NICKNAME}, do you have that? You know, that—

t_ch: 是这个吧！阿雅帮小灰准备好了「豹币」，让*我们*转交给你。
t_en: This, right? Agy has prepared Seal Tokens for Little Gray. Allow us to pass them to you.

t_ch: 不愧是阿格莱雅大人！有了「豹币」，就能购买参赛的小海豹了。
t_en: As expected of Lady Aglaea! With these Seal Tokens, you can buy baby seals to join the competition.

t_ch: 选手们，选手们。
t_en: Attention contestants!

t_ch: 小组赛即将开始，请选手们带上自己的小海豹，前往比赛场地……
t_en: The group stage is about to begin. Please bring your baby seals and head to the arena...

t_ch: 比赛要开始了，来我的商店里消费一番，备好足够数量的小海豹吧。
t_en: The matches are about to begin. Shop to your heart's content at my place, and prepare enough baby seals.

t_ch: 买买买，反正不是我的钱。
t_en: Fine. It's not my money anyway.

t_ch: 小灰，一会比赛见！
t_en: Little Gray, see you in the arena later!

t_ch: 这要清理起来得多麻烦啊，千万别再添堵了。
t_en: This is going to be a headache to clean up. Please don't make it worse.

t_ch: 我嘞个黑圣杯也是联动内容吗？
t_en: Is the Black Grail a part of the collab too!?

t_ch: 求求你讲点我听得懂的吧。
t_en: Please say something I can understand.

t_ch: 你们该多攒点阳光信用积分了。
t_en: Time for you to save up some good karma.

t_ch: 啊？我平时一直积德行善啊。
t_en: What? I've always been a good person.

t_ch: 调查的事就拜托你们了。
t_en: I'll leave the investigation to you.

t_ch: 你注视着黑色的池水，池水里黑色的倒影也在注视着你，你们互相眨了眨眼睛。
t_en: You stare into the black waters as the dark reflection stares back at you. You blink at each other.

t_ch: 也许我应该观察一番。
t_en: Maybe I should inspect closer.

t_ch: 哇！这是谁，这么好看！
t_en: Woah! Who's this fabulous devil?

t_ch: 哇，真是直率的小灰啊。
t_en: Little Gray, you're so direct.

t_ch: 也许我应该品尝一番。
t_en: Maybe I should give it a taste.

t_ch: 一束光正在你的视线中消逝远去。
t_en: A ray of light fades and departs from your sight.

t_ch: 啊，那是星穹列车即将发车的信号……
t_en: Ah, that's the signal for the Astral Express' imminent departure...
Blergh—

t_ch: 就调查到这吧。
t_en: Let's end the investigation here.

t_ch: 如果小飞儿真的盯上了*这里*的话，就算这些事不是她做的，估计她也都看在眼里……
t_en: If this place really caught Little Ciphy's interest, even if she didn't do it, she probably saw everything...

t_ch: 说不定她现在就藏在这附近，就差一个「诱饵」将她钓出来——
t_en: Maybe she's hiding nearby right now. All we need is a bait to lure her out...

t_ch: 小鱼干，逗猫棒…可不可以？
t_en: How about... dried fish treats and a cat stick?

t_ch: …不可以。
诶？小飞儿明明以前很喜欢的。
t_en: Huh? Little Ciphy used to like those.

t_ch: 以前也不喜欢。
t_en: I never liked them.

t_ch: 这有个{F#小美女}{M#小帅哥}可不可以？
t_en: How about a {F#pretty girl}{M#handsome guy}?

t_ch: 小灰你说的是…你自己？
t_en: Are you... talking about yourself, Little Gray?

t_ch: 别这么自恋好吧。
t_en: Don't be so smug.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅…可不可以？
t_en: How about... Aglaea?

t_ch: 有裁缝女没我，你再想想。
t_en: I'm not sharing space with that seamstress. Try again.

t_ch: 钱…可不可以？
t_en: How about... money?

t_ch: 可以。
t_en: That works.

t_ch: …但要看你给多少。
t_en: ...But it depends on how much.

t_ch: 那小飞儿看看*我们*手上的金币够不够？嘿，接着——
t_en: Then, see if we have enough gold coins for you here, Little Ciphy. Catch!

t_ch: 一枚金币…缇宝阿姐你是不是诚心想找我啊，搁这来逗猫玩儿啊？
t_en: A single coin... Big sis Tribbie, do you really have business with me, or are you here to tease the cat again?
